eip_threads.title: PeerDAS - Peer Data Availability Sampling

thread.summary: blob-devnet-0 launched but supernodes not respecting MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS; Lighthouse and Prysm need fixes.
blob-devnet-0 running with 20 nodes; Lighthouse/Prism ready, Teku/Nimbus in progress.
Testing partial cells on blob-devnet-0; Lighthouse/Prism live with disconnects under investigation; need Teku, Nimbus, Grandine, Lodestar onboarded.
CL teams to release hidden flags for Sepolia/Holesky testing; skipping expensive DevNet and testing directly on testnets.

eip_threads.current_state: Partial cells testing underway on blob-devnet-0; moving to testnet deployment on Holesky/Sepolia with hidden flags.
open_questions: When will remaining CL clients (Teku, Nimbus, Grandine) complete PeerDAS implementation?
Are disconnection issues on blob-devnet-0 resolved?

eip_threads.title: Enshrined Proposer-Builder Separation

thread.summary: EPBS devnet-0 scope changed to target v1.7.0-alpha.2 moving blob KZG commitments to bid; all CL teams support alpha-2.
Variable PTC deadline PR postponed to post-devnet-0; min builder withdrawability delay lowered to 64 epochs.
DevNet 0 will not focus on fork choice edge cases; Prysm fork choice ready in 1-2 days, Teku passing Alpha 2 tests except fork choice.
All CL clients need 1-2 weeks; Feb 18 target unrealistic; Lighthouse fixing gossip/import bug.
Lodestar/Lighthouse interop working; Teku ready end-week; Prism next week; DevNet-0 launches March 4th regardless of client count.
Prysm passing Kurtosis and finalizing robustly; Lighthouse needs queuing fix for payload-before-block; Teku finalizing storage work; DevNet-0 will ignore payload attestations initially.

eip_threads.current_state: EPBS devnet-0 targeting March 4th launch with alpha-2 spec; multiple clients approaching readiness with focus on stability over edge cases.
open_questions: Will Lighthouse fix payload queuing issue before launch?
When will fork choice and sync testing begin after initial stability?
Will Grandine join devnet-0 or wait for later devnets?

eip_threads.title: Block-Level Access Lists

thread.summary: execution-apis PRs 726/727 add EIP-7928 JSON RPC methods pending merge.
bal-devnet-2 launched with BAL implementation; Nimbus issue relates to block access list for finalized blocks.
BAL DOS protection hard cap on items added via PR 11234; formula may simplify with EIP-7981; JSON-RPC methods simplified to use block number/tag/hash.
Execution APIs PRs 726 and 746 ready to merge; test fixture metadata adds block access list to each block.

eip_threads.current_state: BAL running on devnet-2 with DOS protection being refined; execution-apis PRs ready for merge; testing infrastructure updated with metadata fields.
open_questions: Will EIP-7981 integration simplify DOS protection formula?
Are Nimbus finalized block access list issues resolved?

eip_threads.title: Increase Maximum Contract Size

thread.summary: EIP-7954 scoped for DevNet-3 alongside EIP-8037, ETH/70, and optional ETH/71.
In DevNet-3 scope; Nethermind targeting Wednesday, other clients progressing.

eip_threads.current_state: Included in bal-devnet-3 scope targeting March 4th launch.

eip_threads.title: eth/70 - partial block receipt lists

thread.summary: ETH/70 implementation ready in Besu; kurtosis testing shows clients syncing unexpectedly; full-sync bypasses receipts so snap-sync needed.
ETH/70 critical blocker for scaling beyond 83M gas; should be tested in isolation before adding to BAL devnets.
NFT-devnet-10 launched for ETH/70 testing; Geth/Nethermind confirm sync impossible without ETH/70 for large receipts; Besu syncing externally.
ETH/70 included in DevNet-3 scope with ETH/71 optional.
Besu eth/70 ready; Reth eth/70 ready; both can join nft-devnet-10.

eip_threads.current_state: ETH/70 testing progressing on nft-devnet-10; Besu and Reth ready; confirmed critical for scaling beyond 83M gas limit.
open_questions: When will all clients be ready for ETH/70 integration?
Has snap-sync testing validated ETH/70 receipt handling?

eip_threads.title: Increase Calldata Floor Cost

thread.summary: EIP-7976 (data repricing) most advanced with complete specs; awaiting final numbers end of March after BAL benchmarks.

eip_threads.current_state: Spec complete; waiting on BAL-optimized benchmarks for final gas numbers expected end of March.
open_questions: Will EIP-7976 be included in DevNet-3 or DevNet-4?

eip_threads.title: Increase Access List Cost

thread.summary: EIP-7981 (data repricing) most advanced with complete specs; awaiting final numbers end of March after BAL benchmarks.
EIP-7981 may simplify BAL DOS protection formula.

eip_threads.current_state: Spec complete; may simplify BAL DOS protection; waiting on final benchmarking numbers.
open_questions: How will EIP-7981 integration affect BAL DOS protection implementation?

eip_threads.title: State Creation Gas Cost Increase

thread.summary: EIP-8037 (state growth) specs progressing with multidimensional metering details being updated; recommended for DevNet 3 as most complex implementation.
DevNet-3 scope includes EIP-8037; testing concerns raised that many existing tests will break and need refill assessment.
EIP-8037 dynamic cost-per-byte blocked on testing framework complexity; DevNet-3 will hardcode cost-per-byte at 100M gas with full dynamic version on DevNet-4.
Spencer targets tests by ACDE Thursday using EELS PR; EIP-3155 tracer changes for state gas approved.
Besu needs 8037 review; Reth missing 8037 only; Nethermind targeting Wednesday for DevNet-3 readiness.

eip_threads.current_state: DevNet-3 implementing simplified version with hardcoded cost-per-byte; dynamic multidimensional version deferred to DevNet-4; tests in progress.
open_questions: Will simplified hardcoded version adequately test state growth concerns?
When will dynamic cost-per-byte version be ready for DevNet-4?

eip_threads.title: State-access gas cost update

thread.summary: Full benchmark loop exceeds 1 day for single data point; test definition issues found; EIP-8038 numbers delayed past month-end.

eip_threads.current_state: Benchmarking in progress but delayed due to test definition issues and long benchmark cycles.
open_questions: When will corrected benchmarks be available?

eip_threads.title: eth/71 - Block Access List Exchange

thread.summary: ETH/71 adds BAL query method; scoped as optional for DevNet-3 so clients can participate without it.

eip_threads.current_state: Optional inclusion in bal-devnet-3; adds BAL query capability to networking layer.
open_questions: Which clients will implement ETH/71 for DevNet-3?
Will ETH/71 become mandatory in later devnets?
